subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I make mention of Thee in this moment wherein the doves of Thy sacred sovereignty warble their melodies and the rains descend [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی اذکرک حینئذ حین الذی تغرد فیه حمامات قدس سلطنتک و تمطر
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @martyrs and martyrdom, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @love of God
